name: claude-remote-sessions
title: Claude Remote Sessions
description: Inventory and open your Claude Code Remote Control sessions without juggling browser tabs.
author: eaescob

commands.name: list-sessions
commands.title: List Remote Sessions
commands.subtitle: Claude Code
commands.description: Browse running Claude Code sessions and open their Remote Control web view.

commands.name: menubar
commands.title: Remote Sessions Menu Bar
commands.subtitle: Claude Code
commands.description: At-a-glance status of Claude Code sessions in the menu bar.

preferences.name: onlyRemoteControl
preferences.title: Sessions
preferences.label: Only show Remote Control sessions
preferences.description: Hide dispatch, cowork, and other non-Remote-Control sessions.

preferences.name: includeArchived
preferences.title: Archived
preferences.label: Show archived sessions
preferences.description: Include sessions marked archived in the list.
